title: ACA Filing Fee Waiver -- BPASS/One Group Federal Compliance Submission
summary: HR representative Richard presents waiver for late-filed ACA compliance submission. One Group (BPASS parent company) handles ACA data tracking and compilation; filing fee covers per-head submission to federal government. Council President confirms she was pre-briefed and supports pushing the waiver through.

processing_notes: ACA = Affordable Care Act. BPASS parent company is One Group. Fee is per-head for federal filing. Agenda description references SCSD field turf (item 10) but segment content is about ACA waiver (supplemental item 10).
